basics.name: Prasad Kavuri
basics.label: VP / Head of AI Engineering
basics.summary: Applied AI engineering executive with 20+ years building production-grade AI platforms at enterprise scale. Core differentiator: bridges the gap between AI research and enterprise reliability — ships AI systems that are observable, governed, and cost-efficient. Led AI platforms serving 13,000+ B2B customers with 70% infrastructure cost reduction.

work.name: Krutrim (Ola)
work.summary: Architected India's first Agentic AI platform (Kruti.ai) from zero to production. Designed and shipped platform serving 13,000+ B2B customers across logistics, automotive, and mobility.
highlights: 70% infrastructure cost reduction via intelligent LLM routing (FinOps)
Closed-loop evaluation engine with automated hallucination regression detection
Production governance: HITL checkpoints, drift monitoring, audit trails
Scaled engineering organization to 200+ engineers across US, Europe, and India

work.name: HERE Technologies
work.summary: Scaled AI platform globally across APAC, EMEA, and Americas during 18-year tenure. Led global engineering for Highly Automated Driving maps for OEM autonomous platforms.
highlights: 50% latency reduction through quantization, speculative decoding, and multi-model routing
Built multi-agent orchestration layer for real-time HD mapping and autonomous driving data pipelines
Established LLMOps observability stack: trace-ID propagation, cost dashboards, anomaly detection
Led global engineering organization with 200+ engineers
